app.name: OpenMasjid Students
app.tagline: The madrasa office in one app

auth.loginSubtitle: Sign in to your madrasa's office
auth.setupSubtitle: First-run setup — this account manages everything on the masjid network.
auth.adminTunnelNote: Admin sign-in only works on the masjid network. Teachers, finance and parents can sign in from anywhere.
auth.setupOnLanBody: Set up the admin account from a device on the masjid’s own Wi-Fi — for safety, the first admin can’t be created over the internet.
auth.changeSubtitle: Please choose a new password to continue.

home.title: You’re signed in
home.next: Your role’s dashboard arrives in the next steps — attendance, grades, billing and the family portal.

directory.title: Directory
directory.empty: No families yet. Add your first family to get started.
directory.name: Name
directory.pinHint: A 6-digit PIN is created automatically — parents use the child’s name + PIN to pay.
directory.inviteHint: Creates a one-time sign-up link (valid 7 days) — copy it to the guardian. They need an email on file.

schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.manualHint: Add each weekly session — you’ll be warned (never blocked) if a teacher or room is double-booked.
schedule.warnTeacher: {{teacher}} is also teaching {{class}} at this time.
schedule.warnRoom: {{room}} is also booked for {{class}} at this time.
schedule.pickToView: Pick one to see its week.

teach.weekIntro: Here’s your teaching week. Open a class to see its roster and subjects.
teach.noSessions: You have no scheduled sessions yet. The office sets the timetable.
teach.noClasses: You’re not assigned to any classes yet.
teach.classDenied: This class isn’t assigned to you.

attendance.title: Attendance
attendance.pastDate: Editing a past day — this change is recorded.
attendance.discardUnsaved: You have unsaved attendance for this day. Switch date and discard it?

gradebook.title: Gradebook
gradebook.noItems: No assignments yet. Add one to start grading.
gradebook.overMax: That score is above the maximum of {{max}}.
gradebook.saveFailed: That score couldn’t be saved. Please try again.
gradebook.confirmDelete: Delete “{{title}}” and all its scores? This can’t be undone.

transcript.title: Transcript
transcript.hint: The transcript is the student's cumulative record across all closed terms. Regenerating keeps old versions; publish makes the latest visible to parents (portal coming soon).

reports.title: Report cards
reports.hint: Generating a card after fixing marks creates a new version — old versions are kept. Publish makes the latest visible to parents (portal coming soon).

exams.title: Exams
exams.noExams: No exams in this term yet.
exams.noTerms: Add a term (in Classes) before creating exams.
exams.noClasses: No classes in this term yet.
exams.noSubjects: This class has no subjects to grade.
exams.confirmUnassign: Remove this exam from the class? Any marks entered for it will be deleted.
exams.noneAssigned: No exams assigned to this class yet. The office sets these up.
exams.cellHint: Type a mark, or “a” for absent, “e” for exempt. Leave blank if not yet marked.
exams.overMax: That mark is above the maximum of {{max}}.
exams.saveFailed: That mark couldn’t be saved. Please try again.
exams.remarkPlaceholder: Optional remark for this student’s report card

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcomeBody: Manage your madrasa — families, students, classes and records. Pick a section below.

classes.setCurrentHint: Double-click to make this the current term
classes.noTerms: Add a term to start creating classes.
classes.noClasses: No classes in this term yet.
classes.subjectsHint: Comma-separated, e.g. Sabaq, Sabqī, Manzil, Tajwīd
classes.confirmClose: Close this term? Each student's final grade will be frozen from the current exam marks. You can reopen to make changes.
classes.closedNote: This term is closed — final grades are frozen. Reopen to make changes.

staff.title: Staff
staff.name: Name
staff.tempHint: At least 12 characters — changed on first sign-in
staff.formHint: Enter a username and a temporary password of at least 12 characters.

settings.title: Settings
settings.schoolHint: Shown on report cards and statements.
settings.meritOnReportCard: Show merit points on report cards
settings.customFieldsHint: Define fields once — they apply to every student’s record (e.g. previous madrasa, juz at intake, walī name).
settings.meritCategoriesHint: Categories teachers award points against, each with a default value (editable per award).
settings.commentBankHint: Reusable remark snippets all teachers can insert into term remarks and report cards.
settings.snippetHint: e.g. Mashā’Allāh, excellent progress this term.

student.noFields: No custom fields defined. Add them in Settings.

billing.label: Label
billing.confirmReverse: Reverse this payment? A reversal entry will be added.
billing.generateHint: Creates one invoice per family (from assigned fees) for this period. Re-running the same period changes nothing.

family.title: Parent Portal
family.subtitle: Your children, balance, and payments
family.noFamily: Your account isn’t linked to a family yet. Please contact the office.
family.acceptGreeting: Welcome, {{name}}. Choose a password to finish setting up your account.
family.inviteInvalid: This invite link is invalid or has expired. Please ask the office for a new one.
family.registerUnavailable: Self sign-up isn’t available yet. Please ask the office for a portal invite link.
family.loadError: We couldn’t load your family right now. Please try again in a moment.

admissions.invoiceNeedsFee: Pick a fee plan and fill in the invoice details.
admissions.enrolledInvoicePending: Enrolled — the student’s PIN is {{pin}}. The first invoice couldn’t be generated; create it in Billing.

apply.title: Admission enquiry
apply.subtitle: Tell us about your child — the office will be in touch.
apply.error: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment.
apply.thanksBody: We’ve received your enquiry. The office will be in touch soon, in shā’ Allāh.
